출애굽기 22:1.content: If the thief is found breaking in, and is struck so that he dies, there shall be no guilt of bloodshed for him.

출애굽기 22:2.content: If the sun has risen on him, he is guilty of bloodshed. He shall make restitution. If he has nothing, then he shall be sold for his theft.

출애굽기 22:3.content: If the stolen property is found in his hand alive, whether it is ox, donkey, or sheep, he shall pay double.

출애굽기 22:4.content: “If a man causes a field or vineyard to be eaten by letting his animal loose, and it grazes in another man’s field, he shall make restitution from the best of his own field, and from the best of his own vineyard.

출애굽기 22:5.content: “If fire breaks out, and catches in thorns so that the shocks of grain, or the standing grain, or the field are consumed; he who kindled the fire shall surely make restitution.

출애굽기 22:6.content: “If a man delivers to his neighbor money or stuff to keep, and it is stolen out of the man’s house, if the thief is found, he shall pay double.

출애굽기 22:7.content: If the thief isn’t found, then the master of the house shall come near to God, to find out whether or not he has put his hand on his neighbor’s goods.

출애굽기 22:8.content: For every matter of trespass, whether it is for ox, for donkey, for sheep, for clothing, or for any kind of lost thing, about which one says, ‘This is mine,’ the cause of both parties shall come before God. He whom God condemns shall pay double to his neighbor.

출애굽기 22:9.content: “If a man delivers to his neighbor a donkey, an ox, a sheep, or any animal to keep, and it dies or is injured, or driven away, no man seeing it;

출애굽기 22:10.content: the oath of Yahweh shall be between them both, he has not put his hand on his neighbor’s goods; and its owner shall accept it, and he shall not make restitution.

출애굽기 22:11.content: But if it is stolen from him, the one who stole shall make restitution to its owner.

출애굽기 22:12.content: If it is torn in pieces, let him bring it for evidence. He shall not make good that which was torn.

출애굽기 22:13.content: “If a man borrows anything of his neighbor’s, and it is injured, or dies, its owner not being with it, he shall surely make restitution.

출애굽기 22:14.content: If its owner is with it, he shall not make it good. If it is a leased thing, it came for its lease.

출애굽기 22:15.content: “If a man entices a virgin who isn’t pledged to be married, and lies with her, he shall surely pay a dowry for her to be his wife.

출애굽기 22:16.content: If her father utterly refuses to give her to him, he shall pay money according to the dowry of virgins.

출애굽기 22:17.content: “You shall not allow a sorceress to live.

출애굽기 22:18.content: “Whoever has sex with an animal shall surely be put to death.

출애굽기 22:19.content: “He who sacrifices to any god, except to Yahweh only, shall be utterly destroyed.

출애굽기 22:20.content: “You shall not wrong an alien or oppress him, for you were aliens in the land of Egypt.

출애굽기 22:21.content: “You shall not take advantage of any widow or fatherless child.

출애굽기 22:22.content: If you take advantage of them at all, and they cry at all to me, I will surely hear their cry;

출애굽기 22:23.content: and my wrath will grow hot, and I will kill you with the sword; and your wives shall be widows, and your children fatherless.

출애굽기 22:24.content: “If you lend money to any of my people with you who is poor, you shall not be to him as a creditor. You shall not charge him interest.

출애굽기 22:25.content: If you take your neighbor’s garment as collateral, you shall restore it to him before the sun goes down,

출애굽기 22:26.content: for that is his only covering, it is his garment for his skin. What would he sleep in? It will happen, when he cries to me, that I will hear, for I am gracious.

출애굽기 22:27.content: “You shall not blaspheme God, nor curse a ruler of your people.

출애굽기 22:28.content: “You shall not delay to offer from your harvest and from the outflow of your presses. “You shall give the firstborn of your sons to me.

출애굽기 22:29.content: You shall do likewise with your cattle and with your sheep. It shall be with its mother seven days, then on the eighth day you shall give it to me.

출애굽기 22:30.content: “You shall be holy men to me, therefore you shall not eat any meat that is torn by animals in the field. You shall cast it to the dogs.
